about.description: Justice Advocates & Partners, Inc., was established on December 16, 2020, and began operations on January 4, 2021. The Firm was founded by G. Moses Paegar, Golda A. Bonah Elliott, and Albert S. Sims, all of whom are Counsellors-At-Law licensed to practice before the Honorable Supreme Court of Liberia. Each of the founders has over fifteen years of legal practice, with deep expertise in corporate and commercial legal representation and a portfolio of multinational clients operating in Liberia. Justice Advocates & Partners, Inc. (JAP Inc.) is duly established under the laws of the Republic of Liberia and licensed to provide legal and consultancy services to resident and non-resident entities/persons in Liberia.
about.missionDesc: To deliver exceptional legal representation with unwavering dedication to our clients' rights and interests.
about.visionDesc: To be the leading law firm recognized for innovation, excellence, and community impact.
about.valuesDesc: Integrity, professionalism, and client-centered service guide everything we do.
